steps.title: Set equal angles
steps.content:
Angles $M$ and $N$ are equal, so let each measure be $x^\circ$. The three angles of a triangle sum to $180^\circ$.
$$x+x+128=180$$

steps.title: Solve the angle equation
steps.content:
Subtract $128$ from both sides, then divide by $2$.
$$2x+128=180$$
$$2x=52$$
$$x=26$$
The answer is A.
